headline: Robinhood, Dell Lead 5 Stocks Near Buy Points With AI Tailwinds
summary: Dell Technologies, Howmet Aerospace and Cognex are top stocks to watch near buy points this week, leveraging the growth in artificial intelligence and data centers.  Robinhood Markets may be an under-the-radar AI play.  Profitable biotech stock Argenx also makes the cut.
